pages.text: Forest lineage of the Elf race. Stacks on top of the shared Elf traits.$(br2)$(bold)Fleet of Foot.$(/) Movement speed +10%.$(br2)$(bold)Keen Shot.$(/) Bow and crossbow damage +20%.$(br2)$(bold)Forest Camouflage.$(/) While sneaking on a block tagged as foliage (tall grass, leaves), the player turns invisible. Armor is hidden as well.
